channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][PV][公开] Anime News Network Star Wars: Visions Presents - Ninth Jedi Anime的 预告PV 公开 August 5 Debut
item.description: Ghost in the Shell's Production I.G animates expansion of Star Wars: Visions short ― The "First Look | Star Wars: Visions Presents - The Ninth Jedi" panel at Anime Expo presented a new trailer for... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Star Wars: Visions Presents - The Ninth Jedi Anime's Trailer Unveils August 5 Debut

item.description: Screening will have both English-subtitled version, English-dubbed version ― Crunchyroll announced on Thursday it and Sony Pictures Entertainment will release Katsuhiro Otomo's Akira anime film in... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Crunchyroll to Screen Akira Anime Film in U.S., Canada in 4K, IMAX on September 4

item.title: [动画] MyAnimeList Multimedia Project Alien Stage Receives 动画 改编
item.description: The Animate Presents: ALIEN STAGE Panel at Anime Expo 2026 revealed that an anime adaptation of Vivinos' and Qmeng's Alien Stage multimedia project is in production on Thursday. Produced by LICO, the... | 来源: MAL | 原文: Multimedia Project 'Alien Stage' Receives Anime Adaptation

item.title: [动画] MyAnimeList MyAnimeList Reports from 动画 Expo 2026
item.description: Anime Expo, the largest anime convention in North America, returns to Los Angeles Convention Center and will be held July 2–5 this year. MAL users and moderators have attended Anime Expo for years,... | 来源: MAL | 原文: MyAnimeList Reports from Anime Expo 2026

item.title: [动画] MyAnimeList Yoshitaka Amano的 Original 动画 Zan Production
item.description: Yoshitaka Amano's newest company, Yoshitaka Amano Inc., announced on Thursday that the previously announced Zan anime project is in production and revealed the main staff. The pilot will be shown at... | 来源: MAL | 原文: Yoshitaka Amano's Original Anime 'Zan' in Production

item.title: [CAST] MyAnimeList 追加 声优阵容 Mebius Dust Announced
item.description: The official website for the Mebius Dust television anime announced additional cast on Thursday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on Tokyo MX at 11.30 p.m. followed by BS Fuji and MBS on... | 来源: MAL | 原文: Additional Cast for 'Mebius Dust' Announced

item.title: [续作] MyAnimeList Marriagetoxin Gets 第二 季度 Winter 2027
item.description: The 13th and final episode of Marriagetoxin ended with an announcement on Tuesday that a second season is in production. The official website also revealed an announcement promo. The second season is... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Marriagetoxin' Gets Second Season in Winter 2027

item.title: [PV][STAFF][公开] MyAnimeList Blade & Bastard 公开 Main 制作阵容, 第二 预告 宣传视频
